sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43821" key="eu)epipo/lastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐεπι-πόλαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43821.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tending to return</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">be vomited</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.109</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
